title: agropyron corsicum
intro: Agropyron corsicum, also known as Creeping Soft Brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and treating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Agropyron corsicum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
